Body.Content:
We are bringing Amplify capabilities to SharePoint. Soon, you will be able to share your Pages to multiple channels using Amplify without needing to navigate away from SharePoint. You will receive the in-depth Amplify reporting on these pages.

GA date: September CY2025

message.Title: Microsoft Viva: Viva Amplify - Distribute from SharePoint
